descriptionTemplate: Mouchette gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: "Dramatic Encounter" DMG count +2. Each time "Dramatic Encounter" triggers, Mouchette's "Strike" Temporary Final DMG +25%.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Mouchette gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: "Dramatic Encounter" DMG instances +2. The trigger limit per turn is increased to 5. Each time "Dramatic Encounter" is triggered, Mouchette's "Strike" Temporary Final DMG +25%. Immediately generate 2 Temporary {Mortal Blast} with 0 Arithmetica Cost.
